text: Eternity is in love with the creations of time
author: William Blake

text: Our potential is one thing. What we do with it is quite another
author: Angela Duckworth

text: Talent x Effort = Skill -- Skill x Effort = Achivement
author: Angela Duckworth

text: Purpose is the intention to contribute to the well-being of others
Wether you think you can, or think you cant't - you're right
author: Henry Ford

text: I simply wasn't going to fail because I didn't care or didn't try. That's not who I am
author: Tom Deierlein

text: I just never thought i couldn't
author: Lightning Mcqueen

text: Most runners run not because they want to live longer, but because they want to live life to the fullest
author: Haruki Murakami

text: You will have to wait until tomorrow to find out what tomorrow will bring
author: Haruki Murakami

text: Pain is the price we pay for pleasure, so too is pleasure our reward for pain
author: Anna Lembke

text: What doesn't kill me makes me stronger
author: Friedrich Nietzsche
